name: claude-market
description: Personal marketplace of skills, commands, and agents for use across projects.

plugins.name: example-plugin
plugins.description: Template plugin with one skill, one command, and one agent. Copy it as the starting point for a new plugin.

plugins.name: engineering-foundations
plugins.description: Stack-neutral engineering knowledge skills (clean architecture, security).

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: Read-only architecture auditor with a PASS/FAIL gate verdict.

plugins.name: research-tools
plugins.description: Read-only investigation agent for codebase and web research.

plugins.name: sdd-engineering
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow: spec, plan, orchestrated implementation with review gates, and retrospective.
